PluginData.Author: CometWorks
PluginData.Tooltip: Quasar entity viewer column and browser-side Space Engineers grid viewer.
PluginData.Description:
Grid Viewer contributes the viewer column on Quasar's Entities page and hosts the browser-side Space Engineers grid and asteroid viewer assets.
This first UI plugin adapter replaces only the fine-grained viewer column targets and reuses Quasar's current fullscreen viewer dialog through the host-provided OpenEntityViewer callback while the full viewer runtime is extracted from Quasar core.
